era_context: Early Dynastic Period III Mesopotamia, Fourth Dynasty Egypt, mature Indus Valley Civilization. No documented transitions or major events.

historiographic_note: 2603 BCE is archaeologically and historically invisible. No sources document specific events for this year. This reflects the fundamental limitation of ancient chronology: most individual years in the pre-classical world cannot be distinguished or documented.
